title: hypericum petiolulatum subsp. yunnanense
intro: Hypericum petiolulatum subsp. yunnanense, also known as the Yunnan St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Yunnan St. John's Wort include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and relieving anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Yunnan St. John's Wort can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
